title: boscia coriacea
intro: Boscia coriacea is a type of plant species native to tropical Africa, also known as the "Monkey Bread Tree", which belongs to the Sapindaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can help to soothe wounds and reduce swelling. The health benefits of Boscia coriacea include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and support the immune system. Boscia coriacea can be prepared as an herbal decoction, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional African folk medicine to treat various ailments.
